'''âl-p-h''' ('''lapaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:precelebrate|precelebrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:precelebrate|precelebrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-p-h
|-
! Lemma
| lapaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lapahithi|lapahithi]] || [[word:lapahiji|lapahiji]] || [[word:lapahishi|lapahishi]] || [[word:lapahi|lapahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lapahuthuth|lapahuthuth]] || [[word:lapahujuj|lapahujuj]] || [[word:lapahushush|lapahushush]] || [[word:lapah|lapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lapahuthu|lapahuthu]] || [[word:lapahuju|lapahuju]] || [[word:lapahushu|lapahushu]] || [[word:lapahu|lapahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lapahufuth|lapahufuth]] || [[word:lapahufuj|lapahufuj]] || [[word:lapahufush|lapahufush]] || [[word:lapahuf|lapahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lapahethe|lapahethe]] || [[word:lapaheje|lapaheje]] || [[word:lapaheshe|lapaheshe]] || [[word:lapahe|lapahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lapahothoth|lapahothoth]] || [[word:lapahojoj|lapahojoj]] || [[word:lapahoshosh|lapahoshosh]] || [[word:lapah|lapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lapahotho|lapahotho]] || [[word:lapahojo|lapahojo]] || [[word:lapahosho|lapahosho]] || [[word:lapaho|lapaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lapahofoth|lapahofoth]] || [[word:lapahofoj|lapahofoj]] || [[word:lapahofosh|lapahofosh]] || [[word:lapahof|lapahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lapahĂŠthĂŠ|lapahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lapahĂŠjĂŠ|lapahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lapahĂŠshĂŠ|lapahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lapahĂŠ|lapahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lapahathath|lapahathath]] || [[word:lapahajaj|lapahajaj]] || [[word:lapahashash|lapahashash]] || [[word:lapah|lapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lapahatha|lapahatha]] || [[word:lapahaja|lapahaja]] || [[word:lapahasha|lapahasha]] || [[word:lapaha|lapaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lapahafath|lapahafath]] || [[word:lapahafaj|lapahafaj]] || [[word:lapahafash|lapahafash]] || [[word:lapahaf|lapahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lapahasha|lapahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golapahasha|golapahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilapahasha|gokilapahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lapahnĂŒsha|lapahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golapahnknĂŒsha|golapahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilapahnĂŒsha|gokilapahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lapahshĂ«sha|lapahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golapahnkshĂ«sha|golapahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilapahshĂ«sha|gokilapahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lapahrosha|lapahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golapahnkrosha|golapahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilapahrosha|gokilapahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lapahmusha|lapahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golapahnkmusha|golapahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilapahmusha|gokilapahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lapahsherasha|lapahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golapahnksherasha|golapahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilapahsherasha|gokilapahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lapahngasha|lapahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golapahnkngasha|golapahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilapahngasha|gokilapahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lapahyasha|lapahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golapahnkyasha|golapahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilapahyasha|gokilapahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lapahyamasha|lapahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golapahnkyamasha|golapahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilapahyamasha|gokilapahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lapahnĂŒshĂ«sha|lapahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golapahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|golapahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilapahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokilapahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lapahnĂŒrosha|lapahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golapahnknĂŒrosha|golapahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilapahnĂŒrosha|gokilapahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lapahnĂŒmusha|lapahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golapahnknĂŒmusha|golapahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilapahnĂŒmusha|gokilapahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lapahshĂ«nĂŒsha|lapahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golapahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|golapahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilapahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokilapahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lapahshĂ«rosha|lapahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golapahnkshĂ«rosha|golapahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilapahshĂ«rosha|gokilapahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lapahshĂ«musha|lapahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golapahnkshĂ«musha|golapahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilapahshĂ«musha|gokilapahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lapahronĂŒsha|lapahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golapahnkronĂŒsha|golapahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilapahronĂŒsha|gokilapahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lapahroshĂ«sha|lapahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golapahnkroshĂ«sha|golapahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilapahroshĂ«sha|gokilapahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lapahromusha|lapahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golapahnkromusha|golapahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilapahromusha|gokilapahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lapahmunĂŒsha|lapahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golapahnkmunĂŒsha|golapahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilapahmunĂŒsha|gokilapahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lapahmushĂ«sha|lapahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golapahnkmushĂ«sha|golapahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilapahmushĂ«sha|gokilapahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lapahmurosha|lapahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golapahnkmurosha|golapahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilapahmurosha|gokilapahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lapah|lapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠh|lĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holapah|holapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holĂŠpĂŠh|holĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholapah|hoholapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholĂŠpĂŠh|hoholĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒlapah|nĂŒlapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒlĂŠpĂŠh|nĂŒlĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlapah|nĂŒnĂŒlapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠpĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻlapah|nĂŻlapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻlĂŠpĂŠh|nĂŻlĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlapah|nĂŻnĂŻlapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠpĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulapah|lulapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulĂŠpĂŠh|lulĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululapah|lululapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululĂŠpĂŠh|lululĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilapah|lilapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilĂŠpĂŠh|lilĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililapah|lililapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililĂŠpĂŠh|lililĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolapah|kolapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolĂŠpĂŠh|kolĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolapah|kokolapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolĂŠpĂŠh|kokolĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelapah|kelapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelĂŠpĂŠh|kelĂŠpĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelapah|kekelapah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelĂŠpĂŠh|kekelĂŠpĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
